CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF THE GOLDEN 1 CREDIT UNION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NASH, PATHENA POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 2005 HYUNDAI ELANTRA VIN#KMHDN46D95U154030, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $16,696.63 DAMAGES, $2,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $893.33 COSTS, $1,900.80 PREJUDGMENT INTEREST 5.79%, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,490.76, FAIR MARKET VALUE $8920.00 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
